name: IT Girls BCN✨🍀
description:
☕💻 IT Girls Barcelona | Brunch & Coffee
Join us for a relaxed and welcoming brunch designed to connect women in tech and those interested in the industry.
Whether you’re a software engineer, designer, data analyst, product manager, IT support professional, student, or simply curious about the tech world, this is a space to meet like-minded women, exchange experiences, expand your network, and make new friends in Barcelona.
There’s no agenda or formal presentations—just good coffee, great conversations, and a supportive community.
About the organizer
Hi! I’m Ana Luiza, a Brazilian living in Barcelona and working in IT as a Product Support & Customer Support professional, with around 5 years of experience. I’m passionate about technology, continuous learning, and creating communities where women can connect, support each other, and grow together.
I started IT Girls Barcelona because I believe that some of the best opportunities begin with a simple conversation. My goal is to create an inclusive, friendly, and inspiring space where everyone feels welcome, whether you’re just starting your career or already have years of experience.
I look forward to meeting you over coffee! ☕💖

location.venue: Brunch and The City, Barcelona, Catalunya
